intro: Atropa belladonna cream, also known as deadly nightshade cream, is a topical preparation derived from the Atropa belladonna plant, traditionally used to treat certain skin conditions such as eczema and psoriasis. The cream is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe and calm irritated skin. However, it is essential to note that Atropa belladonna is highly toxic and should only be used under the guidance of a medical professional.
